info.title: PickUp Logistics API
info.description: API documentation for PickUp Logistics backend

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health check and API documentation endpoints

get.description: Returns the health status of the API server
Returns the Swagger UI for API documentation

post.description: Creates a new user account and sends OTP to email for verification. If role is 'business', companyName and companyAddress are required.

password.description: Password must be 8-30 characters and contain only letters and numbers

201.description: User registered successfully. OTP sent to email.

message.example: An OTP has been sent to your email.

400.description: Validation error - User already exists, passwords don't match, or invalid input

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns JWT token

401.description: Invalid email/password or account not verified

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to user's email during registration

200.description: OTP verified successfully. User account activated.

message.example: Your Email has been verified successfully..

post.description: Resends OTP to user's email for account verification
Sends password reset link to user's email

200.description: Password reset link sent to email

message.example: Reset Password Link sent to your email

patch.description: Resets user password using the token from email. Token expires in 10 minutes.

password.description: Password must be 8-30 characters and contain only letters and numbers

400.description: Invalid or expired token, or passwords don't match

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information. companyName and companyAddress can only be updated by users with 'business' role.

companyName.description: Only allowed for users with 'business' role

companyAddress.description: Only allowed for users with 'business' role

403.description: Forbidden - Cannot update company fields without business role

password.description: Password must be 8-30 characters and contain only letters and numbers

post.description: Logs out the authenticated user by clearing the JWT cookie

patch.description: Deactivates the authenticated user's account (soft delete)

get.description: Returns all addresses for the authenticated user, sorted by default address first. Maximum 3 addresses per user.

post.description: Creates a new address for the authenticated user. Maximum 3 addresses allowed per user.

message.example: You Address has been saved Successfully

patch.description: Updates an existing address for the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes an address for the authenticated user. Cannot delete the only address.

patch.description: Sets an address as the default address for the authenticated user. Only one default address allowed per user.

packageType.description: Package type (document, parcel, fragile, electronics, bulk)

post.description: Creates a new shipment pickup. Customers can only have one active pickup at a time. Drivers cannot create pickups.

409.description: Customer already has an active pickup

post.description: Creates multiple shipment pickups at once. Only available to business and admin accounts.

403.description: Forbidden - Only business and admin accounts

get.summary: Get shipment history for a user

post.summary: Assign a driver to a shipment
post.description: Assigns a driver to a PENDING shipment. Transitions status to ASSIGNED. Admin only.

400.description: Only PENDING shipments can be assigned / User is not a driver

post.description: Transitions shipment status from ASSIGNED to PICKED_UP. Driver or admin only.

403.description: Forbidden - Driver or admin access required

post.description: Transitions shipment status from PICKED_UP to IN_TRANSIT. Driver or admin only.

403.description: Forbidden - Driver or admin access required

post.description: Transitions shipment status from IN_TRANSIT to DELIVERED. Driver or admin only.

403.description: Forbidden - Driver or admin access required

post.summary: Create or fetch invoice for a shipment

get.summary: Download invoice PDF for a shipment

post.description: Creates a new admin user account. Only one admin can exist in the system.

password.description: Password must be 8-30 characters and contain only letters and numbers

400.description: Validation error - Admin already exists, passwords don't match, or invalid input

post.description: Authenticates an admin user and returns JWT token

401.description: Invalid email/password or account not verified

get.summary: Get all shipments for admin monitoring
